Title: Create a new user
Test Data:
- ID: user1
- NomeCognome: John Doe
- email: john.doe@example.com
Test Steps:
1. Create a new user with the provided data.
2. Verify that the user is created successfully.

Title: Check password
Test Steps:
1. Retrieve the user with ID "user1".
2. Attempt to check the password with the provided password.
3. Verify that the password check is successful.

Title: Reset password
Test Steps:
1. Retrieve the user with ID "user1".
2. Request a password reset for the user.
3. Provide the new password.
4. Verify that the password is successfully reset.

Title: Get all users
Test Steps:
1. Retrieve a list of all users.
2. Verify that the list contains all created users.

Title: Get device info
Test Steps:
1. Retrieve the device info for a configured device.
2. Verify that the retrieved info matches the device's configuration.

Title: Get configuration
Test Steps:
1. Retrieve the current configuration.
2. Verify that the retrieved configuration matches the set configuration.

Title: Set configuration
Test Data: - New configuration: water=true, max_temp=30.0, max_soil_hum=50.0, min_temp=10.0, min_soil_hum=20.0, max_lum=1000.0, min_lum=500.0

1. Set the configuration with the provided data.
2. Verify that the configuration has been successfully set.

Title: Set water
Test Steps:

2. Verify that the water status has been successfully set.

Title: Set temperature
Test Steps:
1. Set the maximum temperature to the provided value.
2. Verify that the maximum temperature has been successfully set.

Title: Set soil humidity
Test Steps:
1. Set the maximum soil humidity to the provided value.
2. Verify that the maximum soil humidity has been successfully set.

Title: Get alert message
Test Steps:
1. Retrieve the alert message.
2. Verify that the retrieved message matches the set alert message.

Test Steps:

2. Verify that the alert message has been successfully updated.

Test Steps:

2. Verify that the retrieved data matches the collected historical data.

Title: Update history
Test Steps:

2. Verify that the history has been successfully updated.

Title: Connect to greenhouse
Test Steps:
1. Connect to a greenhouse.
2. Verify that the connection is successful.

Title: Click Configuration
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Configuration" button.
2. Verify that the configuration page is displayed.

Title: Check fields
Test Steps:
1. Enter incorrect data for the fields.
2. Verify that an error message is displayed.

Title: Save configuration
Preconditions: Configuration page is displayed with correct data.
Test Steps:
1. Save the configuration with the correct data.
2. Verify that the configuration has been successfully saved.

Title: Display list of greenhouses
Test Steps:
1. Display the list of greenhouses.
2. Verify that the list contains at least one greenhouse.

Test Steps:

2. Verify that the device has been successfully added.

Title: Add devices with incorrect data
Test Steps:
